---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Permission impact
Does this feature require expanding the addon's permission boundary beyond `ops:read`?
- [ ] No — read-only ops:read is sufficient
- [ ] Yes — requires new permission (specify): _____

## Bridge action dependency
Does this feature depend on a new or planned bridge action?
- [ ] No — uses existing bridge actions
- [ ] Yes — requires new bridge action (specify): _____
- [ ] Yes — depends on planned action (specify Core release): _____

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or design notes here.
